title: Track repo takt version metadata
description: Shared execution root for adding `.takt/version.json` lifecycle writes and summary-time drift warnings without changing scheduler, runner, TUI, or storage behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The feature tree delivers `.takt/version.json` writes on init and upgrade, and summary warnings for missing or outdated repo versions.
Implementation work is split into focused developer beads with explicit dependencies and narrow file scope.
Exactly one shared tester bead, one shared documentation bead, and one shared review bead exist under this feature and depend on the full implementation set as required.
